name: feedback-archivist
description: Turn messy, multi-source customer-discovery/feedback dumps (Slack exports, Google-Drive "Notes by Gemini" .docx meeting notes, segment-foldered research/ICPs/personas, AI-Studio JSON repos, screenshot evidence, audio/video) into ONE clean, deduplicated, verbatim Markdown archive organised by buyer segment with an INDEX — the pre-step that feeds discovery-sentinel and product-strategist. Converts docx/pdf/txt via pandoc, classifies meetings by attendee email domain + source folder, dedupes identical content + notes/transcript pairs + Slack recaps, mines Slack for product feedback (dropping bots/internal-eng/test noise), strips Google/Gemini auto-summaries only where a transcript exists, and builds a who's-who INDEX with provenance and probable dates.
